text:
- Update to 0.11.9

Added file(s):

Removed file(s):
- pkg-plist

Makefile changed:

+LICENSE=		GPLv2

+PLIST_FILES=

+PORTDATA=	*

+DESKTOP_ENTRIES=

+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>

+post-install:

Port maintainer (edwin@mavetju.org) is cc'd.

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test and with RedPorts (all RELEASES), sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: ports)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.

port test: clean
